eventItems.title: 2026 Davis Park FD LOTTERY
eventItems.content: Please support the Davis Park Fire Department with your $100 tax deductible donation and get a chance to win a great cash prize! Only 400 chances will be sold. Top price is $10,000 shares with 11 additional cash prices. Please see a DPFD member, or stop by the Davis Park Fire Department or Post Office to purchase your chance to win!
